hero.label: Benchmarks
hero.title: Performance Benchmarks
hero.description: Measured performance snapshots of OfficeIMO operations on .NET 8.0, Release configuration.

scenarios.name: Word: Create 10x10 table
scenarios.notes: Table with header row and borders

scenarios.name: Excel: Write report (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 114.3 ms. Insert objects, table, and AutoFit on a single worksheet.

scenarios.name: Excel: Write report (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 244.3 ms. Insert table and adjust columns on a single worksheet.

scenarios.name: Excel: Read objects (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 86.1 ms. Reader path materializing dictionary-style rows.

scenarios.name: Excel: Read DataTable (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 82.3 ms. Reader path materializing a DataTable from the same workbook.

scenarios.name: Excel: Read rows (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 126.3 ms. Worksheet row iteration over the same workbook payload.

scenarios.name: Excel: Load/edit/save (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 106.0 ms. Load workbook, add review column, save to memory.

scenarios.name: Excel: Load/edit/save (2,500 rows)
scenarios.notes: 5-sample snapshot dated 2026-05-12. Median 117.0 ms. Load workbook, add review column, save to memory.
